mapper.sql: p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.price, p.description, p.image_path, p.image_alt, p.scene_id, p.stock_status, p.is_published, p.is_featured, p.display_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at, s.name AS scene_name, s.slug AS scene_slug
mapper.select: SELECT FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.is_published = TRUE AND p.is_featured = TRUE AND s.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY p.display_order ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.is_published = TRUE AND s.is_active = TRUE
AND p.scene_id = #{sceneId}
SELECT FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_published = TRUE AND s.is_active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.is_published = TRUE AND s.is_active = TRUE AND s.slug = #{sceneSlug}
SELECT FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM products p INNER JOIN scenes s ON s.id = p.scene_id WHERE p.slug = #{slug}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE is_published = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( name, slug, price, description, image_path, image_alt, scene_id, stock_status, is_published, is_featured, display_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{slug}, #{price}, #{description}, #{imagePath}, #{imageAlt}, #{sceneId}, #{stockStatus}, #{published}, #{featured}, #{displayOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, image_path = #{imagePath}, image_alt = #{imageAlt}, scene_id = #{sceneId}, stock_status = #{stockStatus}, is_published = #{published}, is_featured = #{featured}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
